synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0698 Important: Oracle Linux 8 mariadb-devel:10.3 security update
description:
asio
[1.10.8-7]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_28_Mass_Rebuild

galera
[25.3.37-1.0.1]
- Bump release for rebuild - x86_64 and i386 need to be built the same day

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0698

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0698.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
